symbols.name: ResultPagedExtensions
symbols.summary: Represents the result of an operation, which can either be a success or a failure. Contains functional methods to better work with success and failure results and their values, as well as construct results from actions or tasks.

syntax.content: public static class ResultPagedExtensions

parameters.description: The result to check.

returns.description: The current result if it is successful.

parameters.description: The result to check.

returns.description: The current result if it is successful.

symbols.name: ThrowIfFailed(ResultPaged)
symbols.summary: Throws an exception of type TException if the result is a failure.

syntax.content: public static ResultPaged ThrowIfFailed(this ResultPaged result) where TException : Exception

parameters.description: The result to check.

returns.description: The current Result if it indicates success.

parameters.description: The result to check.

returns.description: The current Result if it indicates success.

symbols.name: Log(ResultPaged, ILogger, string, params object[])
symbols.summary: Logs a BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.ResultPaged%601 using structured logging with default levels (Debug on success, Warning on failure).
symbols.remarks: This method never alters the business outcome or throws. It emits consistent fields: LogKey, Page, PageSize, TotalCount, TotalPages, HasNextPage, HasPreviousPage, Messages (count), Errors (count), and ErrorTypes for failures.

syntax.content: public static ResultPaged Log(this ResultPaged result, ILogger logger, string messageTemplate = null, params object[] args)

parameters.description: The paged result instance to log.
The logger to write to. If null, the method is a no-op and returns the original result.
Optional message template for structured logging (e.g., "Fetched page {Page} of products").
Optional structured logging arguments corresponding to messageTemplate.

returns.description: The original result unchanged.

parameters.description: The paged result instance to log.
The logger to write to. If null, the method is a no-op and returns the original result.
Optional message template for structured logging (e.g., "Fetched page {Page} of products").
Optional structured logging arguments corresponding to messageTemplate.

returns.description: The original result unchanged.

symbols.summary: Logs a BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.ResultPaged%601 using structured logging with custom levels.
symbols.remarks: Logging exceptions are swallowed and do not affect the returned BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.ResultPaged%601.

parameters.description: The paged result instance to log.
The logger to write to. If null, the method is a no-op and returns the original result.
Optional message template for structured logging (e.g., "Searched {Entity} page {Page}").
The log level used when the result indicates success.
The log level used when the result indicates failure.
Optional structured logging arguments corresponding to messageTemplate.

returns.description: The original result unchanged.

symbols.name: When(ResultPaged, bool, Func, ResultPaged>)
symbols.summary: Conditionally executes a chain of operations on the paged result based on an external condition. If the condition is false, the original result is returned unchanged.

syntax.content: public static ResultPaged When(this ResultPaged result, bool condition, Func, ResultPaged> operation)

parameters.description: The paged result to operate on.
The condition that determines whether to execute the operations.
A function that receives the result and returns a transformed result through chained operations.

returns.description: The transformed result if condition is true and result is successful; otherwise, the original result.

parameters.description: The paged result to operate on.

returns.description: The transformed result if condition is true and result is successful; otherwise, the original result.
